copyOptions.angle_rationale: The testimonial card template is purpose-built for peer validation, and sleep-anxious adults trust verified customer outcomes more than brand claims alone.
copyOptions.visual_description: A clean flat-design layout on a soft sage green background with a large centered white rounded-corner card. The organica chamomile tea pouch is positioned partially overlapping the bottom-right edge of the card, creating a layered 3D product reveal. The muted palette of sage, white, and deep forest green gives the composition a calm, modern wellness brand feel.
subheadlines: 93% of organica chamomile drinkers report better sleep quality within 7 nights.
Clinically studied chamomile — trusted by thousands of adults with restless nights.
One cup before bed. Backed by real results and a 30-day satisfaction guarantee.

testimonial.quote: I slept 7 hours straight — first time in two years.
